_comment: This file is a task definition TEMPLATE used by CodePipeline + CodeDeploy for blue/green ECS deployments.
<IMAGE1_NAME>          - replaced by CodePipeline/CodeDeploy with the actual ECR image URI from the ECR source action
<EXECUTION_ROLE_ARN>   - replaced by GitHub Actions (prepare-deploy step) with the ECS task execution role ARN
<TASK_ROLE_ARN>        - replaced by GitHub Actions with the ECS task role ARN
<DB_SECRET_ARN>        - replaced by GitHub Actions with the Secrets Manager secret ARN for DB credentials
<LOG_GROUP>            - replaced by GitHub Actions with the CloudWatch log group name (e.g. /ecs/prod/fotos)
<AWS_REGION>           - replaced by GitHub Actions with the deployment region (e.g. eu-west-1)
<DB_ENDPOINT>          - replaced by GitHub Actions with the RDS instance endpoint hostname
<DB_PORT>              - replaced by GitHub Actions with the RDS port (5432)
<DB_NAME>              - replaced by GitHub Actions with the database name (fotosdb)
<S3_BUCKET_NAME>       - replaced by GitHub Actions with the photos S3 bucket name
<CLOUDFRONT_BASE_URL>  - replaced by GitHub Actions with the CloudFront distribution URL
The <IMAGE1_NAME> placeholder is the fixed string CodePipeline looks for in this file.
It is replaced with the ECR image URI from the ECR source action.
Image1ContainerName in the CodePipeline action must match the container name ('app').
